Philosophy

Wisdom gathered from anime and the greatest military minds throughout history.

Anime Philosophy

"We are who we choose to be."

— Golden Dark

"The only way to find true freedom is to break free from the cage you built yourself."

— A Silent Voice

"It's not about who's right, it's about who's left."

— Classroom of the Elite

War Leaders

"Know yourself and you will win all battles."

— Sun Tzu in The Art of War

"War is the highest art of statecraft."

— Sun Tzu in The Art of War

"The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting."

— Sun Tzu in The Art of War
